summary: Frontend testing completed for header navigation, hero buttons, footer links, and new pages (BecomeSellerPage, BecomeInfluencerPage, StoresListPage). All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Header navigation: Products, Stores, Certificates links visible and functional
HomePage hero section: 'Shop Now', 'Become a Seller', 'Become an Influencer' buttons present and clickable
Footer 'Collaborate' section: 'Become a Seller', 'Become an Influencer', 'Seller Login' links present and functional
/become-seller page: Hero section, Mission section, Benefits section, Commission info (10-15%), How It Works steps, FAQ section, CTA section all present
/become-influencer page: Key numbers (15% commission, 10% discount, infinity symbol), Requirements section (1000+ followers), Application form with all inputs
/stores page: Page loads with title 'Tiendas', search input, store cards (2 stores found), CTA button 'Ser Vendedor'
Navigation from header Products link to /products
Navigation from header Stores link to /stores
Navigation from header Certificates link to /certificates
Navigation from hero 'Shop Now' button to /products
Navigation from hero 'Become a Seller' button to /become-seller
Navigation from hero 'Become an Influencer' button to /become-influencer
Navigation from footer 'Become a Seller' link to /become-seller
Navigation from footer 'Become an Influencer' link to /become-influencer
Navigation from footer 'Seller Login' link to /login
critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation links use React Router correctly
Pages are properly translated (Spanish locale working)
Footer has proper 'Collaborate' section with all required links
BecomeSellerPage has comprehensive content: hero, mission, benefits, commission (10-15%), steps, FAQ
BecomeInfluencerPage displays key numbers: 15% commission, 10% discount, infinity symbol for lifetime commissions
BecomeInfluencerPage has 1000+ followers requirement clearly stated
StoresListPage shows store cards with search functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: Header nav (Products, Stores, Certificates), Hero buttons (Shop Now, Become a Seller, Become an Influencer), Footer Collaborate section (Become a Seller, Become an Influencer, Seller Login), /become-seller page with all sections, /become-influencer page with commission model (15%/10%/1000+ followers), /stores page with store cards.
